pr.title: Record: 11L + EMA + Tight SWA + QAT0.15 + VE128 + Partial RoPE + LN Scale (val_bpb: 1.1243)

output.summary: Stack EMA averages into Tight SWA, lengthen warmdown, and initiate late int6 QAT sooner on the 11-layer GQA transformer with partial RoPE.
techniques: EMA weights feed Tight SWA every 50 steps for dual averaging.
Late int6 QAT (threshold 0.15) runs longer with a 3500-step warmdown.
Muon/AdamW mix with VE128, partial RoPE, LN scaling, and U-Net skips in 11-layer GQA.
